preToolUse.bash: INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | python3 -c 'import sys, json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("toolName", ""))'); ARGS=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | python3 -c 'import sys, json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("toolArgs", ""))'); if [ "$TOOL" = "bash" ] && printf '%s' "$ARGS" | grep -E -q 'git reset --hard|git checkout --|rm -rf /'; then echo '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked destructive command by repository policy"}'; fi
